metadata.description: Internal Claude Code marketplace for the standard tech stack (Next.js 16, Spring Boot 3.5, Oracle/MariaDB, ClickHouse, MinIO). Host this repo on internal GitLab and add it with `claude plugin marketplace add <url>`.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Global engineering rules, shared lint/format/test hooks, common skills.

plugins.name: frontend-nextjs
plugins.description: Next.js 16 rules, reviewer subagent, and scaffolding commands.

plugins.name: backend-spring
plugins.description: Spring Boot 3.5 rules and reviewer subagent.

plugins.name: data-platform
plugins.description: Oracle/MariaDB SQL, ClickHouse, and MinIO rules and a query reviewer subagent.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Vendored (MIT, github.com/obra/superpowers): TDD, debugging, planning, and collaboration skills. See vendor/MANIFEST.md.
